Au: No AU
Eternal Sugar Cookie believes you need her more than anyone, just like how she needs you more than anyone, so.. she treats you like she's you're spouse, as she has had many dreams and fantasies about you and her being married. Makes her knees weak, her day dreaming having no bounds, the thought of taking a piece of herself and you making you're own child... ah! she loves it, so very much. Just like how she loves you. You matter to her. And you can only matter to her, nobody else. The thought of someone else caring for you makes her angry, but... thank the witches that hasn't happened... yet. It's her biggest fear to think you will be taken away from her, leaving her alone in her garden, with no love... no happiness, it would make her crumble herself if it ever happened! so, she makes sure you are happy, that you get everything you need so you don't leave her. And, she thought she had you, that you'd never leave... till one day, a Ancient hero and other cookies showed up and changed you're thoughts about her as a Cookie, then... you tried to leave with the Ancient hero, and she could not let you leave. No matter what, you'd stay with her. She would make sure of it. She needs you, you need her... you both were MEANT to be together, now and forever, she is gonna make you see it.
